What's Going On With Quantum Computing Stock Today?
data.description: Quantum Computing shares are down in premarket trading after announcing a dual securities offering expected to raise $50 million for advancing its quantum technologies and expanding its U.S.-based Photonic Chip Foundry.

data.title: Photronics Q4 Earnings: Beats Expectations, CEO Credits Strong US Sales, 2025 Backed By AI, Edge Computing, And Supply Chain Trends
